pool._comment: optional named overrides for per-task [agent: <name>] tags in plan.md; a bare backend id (e.g. 'codex') with no pool entry reuses executor's model/danger settings

_gate_options_reference._comment: per-gate optional fields: baseline:true = delta mode for dirty repos — pre-existing failure signatures (captured once at loop start into .vloop/baseline/) pass, only NEW failures block; fail_pattern = regex selecting failure lines for the signature (default '(FAIL|✗|✖|Error|error)')

_optional_roles_reference._comment: copy any of these into .backends to activate; all are opt-in. readonly:true roles print verdicts (can't write files); write roles must not commit.

vetter._when: one-shot PRD review before planning; blocking findings pause for the human

tester._when: TDD split: writes RED tests per task; executor may not modify them (hash-checked)

qa._when: runs verify_hints/e2e before the judge, records evidence; code changes discarded

oracle._when: one consult per blocked task before escalating to the human

hunter._when: post-acceptance placeholder/mock sweep; findings trigger one replan round

cleaner._when: post-acceptance deslop; discarded if regression gates fail, never blocks milestone

summarizer._when: writes the run summary into AWAITING_HUMAN.md (cheap model)

dispatcher._when: re-tags [agent:] routing after each replan; may only touch tags (diff-checked)

harvester._when: post-acceptance learning extraction into .vloop/AGENT.md + learnings.md; repo changes discarded; knowledge compounds across runs

merger._when: RESERVED: integrates parallel lanes; ignored by the single-lane orchestrator
